meta.title: Luxury Walls Naples | Bespoke Interiors & Architectural Finishes
meta.description: Luxury Walls Naples designs and builds premium interiors with cinematic lighting, custom millwork, and refined architectural finishes.

hero.title: Architectural Spaces Crafted for Legacy Living
hero.description: From statement walls to custom kitchens, we transform residences and commercial spaces into immersive luxury environments with precision craftsmanship.

servicesSection.title: Eight Disciplines. One Luxury Standard.
servicesSection.description: Each service is delivered with an uncompromising attention to detail, material excellence, and lighting harmony.

services.title: Wood Panels
services.description: Architectural wood panel systems engineered for visual depth, acoustic comfort, and timeless sophistication.

services.title: Interior Design
services.description: Spatial concepts curated around your lifestyle, balancing modern restraint with warm, refined textures.

services.title: Interior & Exterior Painting
services.description: Premium paint applications for interiors and facades with flawless finishes, clean edges, and long-term durability.
services.alt: Luxury interior and exterior painting service

services.title: Custom Kitchens & Closets
services.description: Tailor-made kitchens and closet systems combining elegant design, intelligent storage, and high-end craftsmanship.
services.alt: Custom luxury kitchen and closet cabinetry

services.title: Entertainment Center
services.description: Custom entertainment walls and media centers designed for immersive viewing and refined architectural presence.

services.title: Home Decor
services.description: Curated decorative solutions that elevate everyday spaces through texture, balance, and luxurious detail.

services.title: Office Decor
services.description: Executive office interiors designed to project prestige, comfort, and productivity with a unified visual identity.

services.title: Custom Furniture
services.description: One-of-a-kind furniture pieces handcrafted to match your space, function, and signature aesthetic.

instagram.title: Follow Our Latest Installations
instagram.description: See daily progress, behind-the-scenes craftsmanship, and finished projects through our Instagram feed.

contact.title: Start Your Luxury Transformation
contact.description: Tell us about your project and preferred timeline. Our team will schedule a tailored consultation.

footer.legal: Licensed and insured. All rights reserved.
